overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring an old rustic house interior. The character walks through a ground floor room with a piano and vintage furniture, ascends a wooden staircase, and explores an attic bedroom with red patterned wallpaper and exposed wooden beams. The scene has a cinematic, narrative-driven game aesthetic with warm interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor room with piano and vintage furniture

events.description: character stops walking and stands briefly near the piano

agents.ego_description: walking through the room toward the piano, pausing briefly to observe it

entered.detail: dark wooden upright piano with sheet music and a candle on top
vintage upholstered armchair with button tufting
dark wood dresser with multiple drawers
thick wooden banister and staircase leading upward
framed painting hanging on the wall above the piano

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit ground floor room with wooden floors and traditional furnishings. She approaches an upright piano positioned against the far wall, passing a vintage armchair and wooden dresser. The room features a staircase with a thick wooden banister on the right side.

events.description: character turns toward the staircase and begins ascending
character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the attic bedroom

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden stairs toward the upper floor, hand occasionally touching the railing

entered.detail: textured gray stone or plaster wall along the staircase
large wooden bed with carved posts and white bedding visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the piano room and ascends a wooden staircase with a stone wall on one side. As she climbs, a wooden bed becomes visible at the top of the stairs, indicating the entrance to an attic bedroom. The lighting shifts slightly as she moves upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom with sloped ceiling and red wallpaper

events.description: character stops at the foot of the bed and looks up toward the skylight window

agents.ego_description: circling around the bed, examining the room, and looking up at the skylight

entered.detail: burgundy red wallpaper with diamond pattern covering the sloped walls
tall wooden armoire with carved doors
rectangular window in the sloped ceiling letting in bright daylight
small wooden bedside table with a lamp
ornate standing lamp with a decorative shade near the stair railing

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy attic bedroom with red patterned wallpaper and exposed wooden beams. She walks around a large wooden bed with white linens, pausing to look up at a bright skylight window in the sloped ceiling. The room contains a wooden wardrobe, bedside tables, and a brass floor lamp near the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit ground floor living area up into a cozy, sunlit attic bedroom. It begins by gliding through a room with wooden floors and traditional furnishings, passing a vintage armchair and dresser as the character approaches an upright piano. As the character leaves the piano, the camera ascends a wooden staircase flanked by a stone wall, with the lighting shifting as a wooden bed comes into view at the top. The scene then opens into the attic bedroom, moving past a brass floor lamp and a wooden wardrobe toward a large bed with white linens. Finally, the camera pans upward toward a bright skylight window set within the sloped ceiling and exposed wooden beams, contrasting with the red patterned wallpaper of the room.
